channel.title: Troubleshooting on Layer5 Documentation
channel.description: Recent content in Troubleshooting on Layer5 Documentation

item.title: Policy Engine
item.description:
As you build a design, Kanvas continuously evaluates the relationships between your components — to identify connections, validate them, and keep related configuration in sync. This page explains how you can choose which engine performs that evaluation, how to read the relationship indicator, and how to diagnose results that look wrong.

Understanding the Evaluation Engine 🔗

The evaluation engine is a dynamic runtime engine (not a static linter) that analyzes and mutates the design based on registered rules. When processing, it enforces:
